title: Severe Acute Pelvic Pain - Ovarian Torsion
chief_complaint: 15-year-old with sudden severe right lower quadrant pain, nausea, vomiting. Pain is constant, severe, and woke her from sleep. No fever.

physical_exam.abdomen: Severe RLQ tenderness with guarding, rebound

hidden_data.us_pelvis: Enlarged right ovary 8cm with multiple peripheral follicles, absent Doppler flow (no arterial or venous flow), normal left ovary

key_learning_points: Sudden severe pain + ovarian mass + absent flow = torsion
Time is ovary - detorsion within 6-8h for salvage

patient_responses.pain: Worst pain of my life, came suddenly

feedback.correct_message: Excellent! Ovarian torsion is a surgical emergency.
feedback.incorrect_message: This is ovarian torsion. The absent Doppler flow + mass confirm it.
feedback.attending_note: Ovarian torsion: Emergency laparoscopy. Detorsion and ovarian conservation if viable. Cystectomy for underlying mass. Oophoropexy to prevent recurrence. Time is critical - salvage rate decreases after 6-8 hours.
